meaning: vi.下来,下降,遗传(指财产,气质,权利),突击,出其不意的拜访v.下去
examples: The pilots were told to descend to 2-2,000 feet.
It expels gas to descend, and expels water from trim bladders to rise.
After all, seeing cool fish and colourful coral is the main reason divers descend below the surface.
Or whenever a party occurs on Facebook, a lone, half-deflated balloon could descend from the ceiling.
